reconcile.run_scoped_reconcile_mode: Postgres reconciled by fresh test conversation ids derived from run_id; Cassandra reconciled by fresh test conversation ids plus UTC partition bucket; there is no dedicated persisted run_id column
limitations: Client latency is client-observed POST-to-ack latency only, labeled by driver execution location.
Kafka lag reconciliation is not run-scoped in the current schema/tooling; it is consumer-group wide and should be treated as isolated-cluster evidence.

supported_claim: This artifact supports only a local host benchmark claim for scenario "stage-a-smoke-5x10" at run_id "20260608t041624z-61d0b432", with client-observed accept latency and run-scoped Postgres/Cassandra reconciliation by fresh test conversation where available.
